case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. WALTER MARQUES CAVALCANTE

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAVALCANTE, WALTER MARQUES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALTER MARQUES CAVALCANTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
